creator: hq@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

There are currently 14 ports that depends on devel/junit to build: 

biojava-1.5.b2_1,1 
jakarta-commons-dbutils-1.1_1 
mysql-connector-java-5.0.8 
postgis-jdbc-1.2.1 
jakarta-commons-io-1.3.2 
pmd-3.7_1 
je-3.2.13_1 
bouncycastle-1.39_1 
jflex-1.4.1_1 
jakarta-commons-net-1.4.1_2 
sipxconfig-3.6.0_4 
azureus-3.0.5.0 
azureus2-2.5.0.4 
bittyrant-1.1_1 

Can you confirm that nothing breaks with this patch? Otherwise I will have to 
request a repocopy to have two separate ports (JUnit 3 and 4). 

Herve
